mapper.select: SELECT * FROM item_stock WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_stock (item_id, cabinet_id, slot_id, quantity, borrowed_quantity, ledger_weight, actual_weight, warning_quantity, max_quantity, stock_status, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{cabinetId}, #{slotId}, #{quantity}, #{borrowedQuantity}, #{ledgerWeight}, #{actualWeight}, #{warningQuantity}, #{maxQuantity}, #{stockStatus}, #{updatedAt}, COALESCE(#{deleted}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE item_stock SET item_id = #{itemId}, cabinet_id = #{cabinetId}, slot_id = #{slotId}, quantity = #{quantity}, borrowed_quantity = #{borrowedQuantity}, ledger_weight = #{ledgerWeight}, actual_weight = #{actualWeight}, warning_quantity = #{warningQuantity}, max_quantity = #{maxQuantity}, stock_status = #{stockStatus}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
